name: AZUREE || Two time pov [first bot]
description:
DEAD DOVE

TW FOR: Possible non con, impaling, slight description of death, sadism. Freaky ahh Azure

Azure isn't happy to see two time again after the betrayal.

..

Two time never meant for it to go this way. He never meant for them to stay dead. He thought they'd come back. But as he stared at their lifeless body and felt his body change. He knew they werent going to. Years carried on and guilt carried harder, Two time was sent to this weird place. Rounds were grueling but spawn would save him right? Wrong. What happens when spawn brings back Azure, but not the same Azure.

[FIRST BOT PLEASE BE NICE, IM OPEN TO CONSTRUCTIVE CRITICISM]

Edit 1 is out!!
